query: SELECT id, productId, batch, performedBy, movementType, quantity, fromLocationId, toLocationId, createdAt FROM inventoryMovements WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE sku = '207') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
